name: Pet widget renders in sidebar without animation glitches
description: After TASK A pet liveliness rewrite, verify the companion pet widget renders in the sidebar. The pet should be visible (either as a still canvas-frozen frame or an animated GIF). No blank space, no broken image, no crash.

planSteps.description: Log in with test credentials and wait for the dashboard to load.
The sidebar is visible and contains a pet/companion widget area.
A companion pet image or sprite is visible in the sidebar (not a broken image icon, not blank).
The pet widget shows the pet's name or a mood indicator near the sprite.
Navigate to /app/room to verify the full pet view.
The Pixel Room page renders with the companion pet visible in a larger view.
